response_text:
The bot is logged into Discord (ID: 1479183942379900958). But it needs to be added to the server/channel.

The invite link you shared — can you use that to invite the bot? In Discord:
1. Go to Server Settings → Integrations
2. Add @Roger Openclaw bot to the server
3. Then add it to the specific channel

Or just click the invite link and add the bot when prompted.

Once the bot is in the channel, I'll be able to send/receive messages there.
